description: Translates a geometric shape by a displacement vector (dx, dy), moving every point the same distance in the same direction.
utility: Shift a shape by a displacement vector (dx, dy)

arguments.name: shape
arguments.type: point | line | circle | polygon | plot | image

examples.scenario: Translate a point to show it moving inside a circle (Point and Circle lesson)
Translate a line to pass through circle center (diameter through center lesson)
Translate a point to show it on the circle boundary (Point and Circle explanation)
Translate a polygon to create a copy
examples.expression:
T = sas(G, 5, 60, 5, point(G, 0, 0))
T2 = translate(G, T, 6, 0)

A = point(G, 0, 0)
B = point(G, 3, 2)
L = line(G, A, B)
L2 = translate(G, L, 0, 4)

examples.scenario: Translate a point in a plane-tracking scene
examples.expression: G = g2d(at(2,30), size(20), type(geometry)); plane_point = point(G, p, fi(flight)); trans_1=translate(G,plane_point,4,3)

examples.scenario: Translate a secant line to become tangent
